title: PioneerSMP
body:
# Mods used in the pack
## The Pack adds the following mods for performance:
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Lithium
- ModernFix
- Nvidium
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra

## The only required client side mods are:
- Simple Voice Chat
- Status

## Several other mods have been added for visual or recording purposes:
- Cosmetica
- LambDynamicLights
- ReplayMod
- Zoomify

## The rest of the mods are made to provide libraries and support for the different mods:
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Mod Menu
- Reese's Sodium Options
- YetAnotherConfigLib


This server also uses a resource pack for various reasons.
